input:
class Account < ApplicationRecord
  include Closable

  # We used to rely on an external billing service for payment processing.
  # Now we handle it directly via the Stripe gem.
  def process_payment(amount)
    Stripe::Charge.create(amount: amount, currency: 'usd', customer: stripe_id)
  end
end
